# playwright-recast

> Transform Playwright traces into polished demo videos with voiceover, subtitles, zoom, click effects, and more.

playwright-recast is a fluent pipeline library that turns Playwright trace files into production-ready product videos. Your tests already capture everything — traces, screenshots, cursor positions. This library turns those artifacts into narrated, styled videos with a single pipeline.

## Docs

- [Installation](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/getting-started/installation): Install the npm package and system dependencies (ffmpeg)
- [Quick Start](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/getting-started/quick-start): Minimal setup to generate your first video
- [Your First Video](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/getting-started/your-first-video): Step-by-step tutorial
- [System Requirements](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/getting-started/system-requirements): ffmpeg, Node.js, and optional TTS API keys
- [Pipeline Overview](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/pipeline/overview): Architecture, lazy evaluation, and immutable branching
- [Parse](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/pipeline/parse): Extract structured data from Playwright trace.zip
- [Hide Steps](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/pipeline/hide-steps): Filter out setup/login steps
- [Speed Control](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/pipeline/speed-up): Smart speed adjustment based on activity type
- [Subtitles](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/pipeline/subtitles): Generate or import subtitles (SRT, WebVTT, ASS)
- [Text Processing](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/pipeline/text-processing): Sanitize subtitle text before TTS
- [Voiceover](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/pipeline/voiceover): TTS audio generation from subtitles
- [Auto Zoom](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/pipeline/auto-zoom): Animated zoom to user actions with easing
- [Cursor Overlay](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/pipeline/cursor-overlay): Animated cursor at click positions
- [Click Effect](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/pipeline/click-effect): Ripple animation and sound at clicks
- [Text Highlight](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/pipeline/text-highlight): Animated marker overlay on text
- [Frame Interpolation](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/pipeline/frame-interpolation): Smooth out choppy recordings (minterpolate)
- [Background Music](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/pipeline/background-music): Background music with auto-ducking
- [Intro/Outro](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/pipeline/intro-outro): Branded clips with crossfade transitions
- [Render](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/pipeline/render): Final video encoding and subtitle burn-in
- [CLI Reference](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/cli/reference): Command-line interface
- [OpenAI Provider](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/providers/openai): OpenAI TTS configuration
- [ElevenLabs Provider](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/providers/elevenlabs): ElevenLabs TTS configuration
- [Recast Class API](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/api-reference/recast-class): Complete pipeline API reference
- [Types](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/api-reference/types): TypeScript type definitions
- [Subtitle Utilities](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/api-reference/subtitle-utilities): SRT/VTT/ASS writer utilities
- [playwright-bdd Integration](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/integrations/playwright-bdd): BDD step definitions with narrate/zoom/pace helpers
- [recast-studio Integration](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/integrations/recast-studio): Record and generate via Claude Code
- [narrate() Helper](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/helpers/narrate): Add voiceover narration to steps
- [zoom() Helper](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/helpers/zoom): Capture zoom targets during tests
- [pace() Helper](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/helpers/pace): Control pacing in step definitions
- [highlight() Helper](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/helpers/highlight): Mark text for highlight overlay
- [setupRecast() Helper](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/helpers/setup-recast): Register recast fixtures with Playwright
- [Minimal Pipeline Example](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/examples/minimal-pipeline): Simplest possible pipeline
- [Full Pipeline Example](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/examples/full-pipeline): All features combined
- [Branching Pipelines Example](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/docs/examples/branching-pipelines): Multiple outputs from one trace

## Optional

- [Full Documentation](https://thepatriczek.github.io/playwright-recast/llms-full.txt): Complete documentation content for LLMs
